summary: Completed Iteration 7 testing of Console tabbed experience and Stripe-wired pricing flows. All 21 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend pages /console and /pricing load correctly with all tabs functional. Founder cap shows 'Remaining 53/53'. Doctrine footer updates route/state correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Console page loads all 4 tabs: Token & Cost, EDCM Brain, Prompt Context, Donations vs Costs
Token & Cost tab shows Total Paid, Estimated Usage Cost, Estimated Tokens with limit controls
EDCM Brain tab shows metrics (Constraint Mismatch Density, Fixation Coefficient, Escalation Gradient, Context Drift Index, Load Saturation Index) - all showing 'Awaiting a0'
Prompt Context tab has editable context payload with Message, Global context, Model roles (JSON), Per model messages (JSON), Shared pairs (JSON)
Donations vs Costs tab shows OAuth status and support/cost breakdown
Pricing page loads all 4 tabs: Core Access, Support, Founder, Compute Credits
Core Access: $15/month package with features list and Checkout button
Support: Toggle for one-time vs recurring options
Founder: $153 one-time with 'Remaining 53/53' badge showing founder cap
Doctrine footer correctly shows route:/console and route:/pricing on respective pages
Protected routes work - /console and /pricing redirect to /auth when not authenticated
seed_data_creation: Created test user with JWT token for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features all verified working: (1) Console page with 4 tabs - Token & Cost shows usage stats and limit controls, EDCM Brain shows cognitive drift metrics awaiting A0, Prompt Context allows editing context payloads, Donations vs Costs shows OAuth status and financial breakdown. (2) Pricing page with 4 tabs - Core Access $15/mo, Support one-time/recurring toggle, Founder $153 with 53-slot cap showing 'Remaining 53/53', Compute Credits $10/$25/$50. (3) Doctrine footer updates route correctly. (4) Protected routes redirect to auth. Backend tests verify all API endpoints.

Pricing tabs render (Core Access, Support, Founder, Compute Credits) - PASSED
Doctrine footer shows route:/console on console page - PASSED
Doctrine footer shows route:/pricing on pricing page - PASSED
Protected route redirect to auth - PASSED

details: DeepSeek without key - returns 'No API key configured' error
Perplexity without key - returns 'No API key configured' error
Google Cloud A0 connection stub - EDCM metrics show 'Awaiting a0'

stripe_integration_notes.checkout_session: Creates session with emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout using amount-based flow
stripe_integration_notes.status_polling: Returns session status with payment_status field
stripe_integration_notes.catalog_seeding: Uses DB-based catalog with PAYMENT_PACKAGES dict, no direct Stripe product/price creation
